idType.description: Type of the id in the incoming request.

id.description: ID corresponding to the requested idType. Note that channel and threads are represented by the underlying datasource's ID and conversations are represented by their document's ID.

workspaceId.description: Id for the for the workspace in case of multiple workspaces.

direction.description: The direction of the results asked with respect to the reference timestamp. Missing field defaults to OLDER. Only applicable when using a message_id.

timestampMillis.description: Timestamp in millis of the reference message. Only applicable when using a message_id.

includeRootMessage.description: Whether to include root message in response.

datasource.description: The type of the data source.

datasourceInstanceDisplayName.description: The datasource instance display name from which the document was extracted. This is used for appinstance facet filter for datasources that support multiple instances.

body.description: Includes request params such as the id for channel/message and direction.
